name: NXP Semiconductors N.V.
summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. is a semiconductor company that designs and manufactures semiconductors and system solutions. The company serves markets including automotive, industrial, mobile, and communications infrastructure. NXP produces microcontrollers, processors, and connectivity and security solutions. The filing covers the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.
